3008620.name: Entombed
3008620.description:
You wake up in the middle of the night. The lights are all off and something feels off. You grab your flashlight and try to figure out the source of this anomaly.
However, you grow hungry and head to the kitchen where things start to go horribly wrong.

Fight your way through the night with your trusty flashlight to ward off the monster. Throughout the night you will experience two segments of gameplay that will test your wit and resolve as you are pursued constantly throughout the night. Noise is a key factor in determining whether the player will walk away unharmed. However, some other measures may be taken as well to assure that the monster is slain.
3008620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
